meaning: adj.[经]反周期的(指与商业周期既定阶段发展方向相反的,如在商业周期高涨阶段采取通货紧缩政策,以防止通货膨胀等问题出现)
examples: Second, Obama should come out in favor of countercyclical regulatory policy.
That is one of the reasons regulation is rarely countercyclical: regulators can be swept away, as well.
Nor does it matter for countercyclical purposes whether the spending originates in the private sector or the public sector.
Of course, firms with countercyclical activities, such as bankruptcy work, have fared better.
Let each country set vigorous capital standards and adopt a countercyclical regulatory regime.
